community: Optical Tracker. Uses cameras to detect markers or natural features in order to compute position and orientation.

blurb.evidence: Passive input devices can use optical or hybrid tracking systems to capture a user’s gaze or gestures, enabling selection and system-control techniques without direct physical manipulation.
blurb.text: (Passive input devices requires optical or hybrid tracking systems) - Evidence 2 states passive input devices can use optical or hybrid tracking systems to capture gaze or gestures.

blurb.text: (Passive input devices requires Optical Tracker) - Passive input devices use optical tracking systems to capture gaze or gestures, and Optical Tracker is a type of optical tracking system.

community: Hybrid Tracker. Combines multiple sensing technologies to mitigate individual weaknesses such as occlusion or drift.
